claude_reasoning.reasoning: 2025 appears to be a construction/pre-operational phase given zero revenue and all financial metrics are zero. Zero debt opening balance is legitimate if project financing hasn't begun yet.
Zero revenue in 2025 is consistent with construction/development phase. All operational metrics (revenue, gross profit, EBITDA, etc.) are zero, indicating project hasn't begun operations yet.

2034 shows zero debt closing balance along with zero debt service and interest expense, suggesting either debt has been fully repaid or project has entered post-operational phase. This is a legitimate business scenario.
2034 zero debt opening balance is consistent with debt closing balance being zero, indicating no debt carrying forward from previous period. Part of natural debt lifecycle in project finance.
2035 zero debt closing balance continues the pattern from 2034, suggesting project is in post-operational phase or debt-free period. All debt-related metrics are zero consistently.
2035 zero debt opening balance is consistent with 2034's zero closing balance, showing natural progression of debt lifecycle. No debt drawdowns or service activities support this being legitimate.
